## Sentiment
<!-- Overall sentiment of the feedback -->
- [ ] Very positive ("holy shit" moment)
- [ ] Positive
- [ ] Neutral
- [ ] Negative
- [ ] Very negative (crisis)

## Frequency
<!-- How often are we hearing this? -->
- [ ] One-off comment
- [ ] Multiple users (2-5)
- [ ] Recurring theme (6-10)
- [ ] Major trend (10+)

## Philosophy Alignment
<!-- Does this relate to our 11 commandments? -->
- [ ] Commandment #1 - Helpful Neighbor
- [ ] Commandment #2 - Free as Possible
- [ ] Commandment #3 - Register Not Pay
- [ ] Commandment #4 - Advice Not Sales
- [ ] Commandment #5 - Drive to KB
- [ ] Commandment #6 - Drive to Training
- [ ] Commandment #7 - Ridiculously Good
- [ ] Commandment #8 - Inspire Confidence
- [ ] Commandment #9 - Show Value (KPIs)
- [ ] Commandment #10 - Beyond Pure (Privacy)
- [ ] Commandment #11 - Talk-Worthy
- [ ] Not related to philosophy

## Recommended Action
<!-- What should we do with this feedback? -->
- [ ] No action needed (just tracking sentiment)
- [ ] Respond to user
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Consider feature request
- [ ] Fix bug/issue
- [ ] Adjust messaging/copy
- [ ] Create content (blog/video/social)
- [ ] Crisis management needed
- [ ] Other:
